tools.privacyNote: All tools process files locally — your documents never leave your device
tools.view.merge.uploadLabel: Drop PDF files here to merge
tools.view.merge.uploadDescription: You can upload multiple PDF files at once
tools.info.merge.description: Bring several PDFs together into one cohesive document without losing a single detail along the way. The merge function is built for consolidating reports, stitching chapters pulled from different sources, or folding a stack of scanned files into a unified record, and it handles invoices, contracts, and academic papers with equal precision. Before combining, you can drag files into whatever sequence suits you, and each document's original formatting, fonts, and layout carry over intact. Because every step runs inside your own browser rather than on a remote server, your sensitive files never travel anywhere and stay entirely confidential. Once the pieces come together, the finished PDF holds onto its full quality and is ready to save the moment processing wraps up. For professionals who routinely juggle multiple PDFs and need to assemble thorough reports or polished presentations, this is the dependable way to pull everything into a single, well-ordered file.

hiw.subtitle: Edit PDF documents online in seconds. No installation, no signup, complete privacy. Everything happens right in your browser — your files never leave your device.
hiw.step1.title: Upload Your PDF
hiw.step1.desc: Click "Edit PDF" or drag and drop your PDF file directly into the editor. EditoraPDF supports files up to 25MB and processes everything locally in your browser. No uploads to servers, no waiting — instant access.
hiw.step2.title: Edit Your Document
hiw.step2.desc: Use our powerful editor to modify your PDF. Edit text, add images, annotate, reorder pages, rotate, delete, and more. All tools work instantly in your browser with real-time preview.
hiw.step3.title: Export & Download
hiw.step3.desc: Click "Export" to instantly download your finished PDF with all changes applied. Your document remains on your device the entire time.
hiw.feat.title: What Makes EditoraPDF Different
hiw.feat.subtitle: Everything you need for PDF editing in the browser, free and without compromising privacy.
hiw.feat1.title: Instant Processing
hiw.feat1.desc: No queues or waiting. Your PDF is ready to edit immediately after opening.
hiw.feat2.title: 100% Private
hiw.feat2.desc: All operations happen on your device. Files are never sent to any server.
hiw.feat3.title: No Installation
hiw.feat3.desc: Works in modern browsers without plugins or separate applications.
hiw.feat4.title: No Registration
hiw.feat4.desc: Start working immediately without accounts, emails, or passwords.
hiw.feat5.title: Offline Support
hiw.feat5.desc: After loading the page, the tool can work without internet.
hiw.feat6.title: No Watermarks
hiw.feat6.desc: Download your finished PDFs without limitations or extra markings.
hiw.cta.title: Ready to Start?
hiw.cta.desc: Start editing PDFs online right now: no registration, no installation, free and private.
hiw.cta.subline: 100% free • No registration • Processed on your device

hiw.tech1.title: Local Processing
hiw.tech1.desc: EditoraPDF uses PDF.js and pdf-lib, which run directly in the browser. Parsing, editing and creating PDFs is performed locally.
hiw.tech2.title: Privacy by Default
hiw.tech2.desc: Since everything runs locally, no one has access to your files. We do not store or analyze PDF documents.
hiw.tech3.title: Fast & Efficient
hiw.tech3.desc: Modern frontend ensures fast loading, smooth operation and comfortable editing even on older devices.
hiw.limits.title: Current Limitations
hiw.limit2: Best for documents up to 50 pages
hiw.limit3: Complex PDFs with forms may not render perfectly
hiw.limit4: Encrypted or password-protected PDFs are not yet supported
about.subtitle: Making PDF editing simple, accessible, and completely free for everyone. We believe privacy shouldn't be a premium feature.
about.what.title: What is EditoraPDF?
about.what.p1: EditoraPDF is a completely free, open-source online PDF editor that runs entirely in your browser. Unlike traditional PDF editors that require software installation or cloud-based services that upload your files, EditoraPDF processes everything locally on your device.
about.what.p2: Built with modern web technologies, EditoraPDF provides professional-grade PDF editing capabilities — from simple text edits to complex page management — all without compromising your privacy or requiring any signup.
about.mission.title: The Main Goal
about.mission1.title: Democratize PDF Editing
about.mission1.desc: We want professional PDF tools to be accessible to everyone regardless of budget, technical level, or privacy requirements.
about.mission2.title: Privacy by Design
about.mission2.desc: The service is built so that files stay with you. No accounts, no sending documents to a server, no compromises on confidentiality.
about.mission3.title: Open Source & Free
about.mission3.desc: We believe that a quality PDF editor can be open, transparent, and free forever. Anyone can review the code or contribute to its development.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.subtitle: Principles guiding our product development.
about.val1.title: Privacy First
about.val1.desc: All processing happens on your device. We don't see, store, or transmit your documents.
about.val2.title: Instant Access
about.val2.desc: No installation, no registration, no waiting. Open the site and start working immediately.
about.val3.title: 100% Free
about.val3.desc: No hidden fees, premium tiers, or watermarks. All core features are available right away.
about.val4.title: Powerful Tools
about.val4.desc: Text editing, annotations, page management, image insertion, and other essential features in one place.
about.val5.title: Open Source
about.val5.desc: The code is available for review, forking, and contributions. We believe in transparency and community-driven development.
about.val6.title: Community-Driven
about.val6.desc: We listen to users and improve the product based on real scenarios and suggestions.
about.tech.title: Modern Tech Stack
about.tech.p1: EditoraPDF uses modern web technologies for local PDF processing directly in the browser. We rely on PDF.js for rendering and pdf-lib for editing.
about.tech.p2: The interface is built on Next.js and React to ensure fast performance on various devices without server-side file processing.
about.oss.title: 100% open source and free forever
about.oss.desc: EditoraPDF's code is open, and the service is built as a free tool for everyday PDF work. You can review the code, submit improvements, or use the project in your own tasks.
about.cta.title: Questions or feedback?
about.cta.desc: We'd love to hear your feedback, ideas, or bug reports.
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.email.title: Primary Contact Email
contact.email.desc: Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. This is our primary contact method.
contact.social.title: Connect With Us
contact.social.desc: Follow us on social media for updates, tips, and community discussions.
contact.help.title: Need more information?
contact.help.desc: Check our policies and documentation to quickly find answers to common questions.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.desc: Terms and conditions for using EditoraPDF online PDF editor.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Learn how EditoraPDF protects your privacy. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser.
privacy.priority.title: Your Privacy is Our Priority
privacy.priority.desc: EditoraPDF processes all PDFs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device and are never uploaded to our servers.
privacy.disclaimer: Important: the service is provided for general use. Please always verify documents after editing before official use or submission.

tools.info.split.description: Carve a bulky PDF into smaller, easier-to-handle documents in just a few clicks. You can divide by page ranges to pull out specific sections, spin separate files off a single source, or break a long report into tidy chapters, and the tool offers several methods to do it: custom ranges, fixed page counts, or a clean cut at every N pages. That flexibility shines when you're wrestling with email attachment size caps, tidying sprawling documents into bite-sized files, or isolating a handful of pages for standalone use. Every resulting file mirrors the source PDF's formatting, images, and text fidelity, so nothing degrades in the process. The work finishes in an instant and stays confined to your browser, meaning your documents never leave the device in your hands. Students sorting course materials, professionals wrangling large document collections, and anyone who simply wants more manageable PDF pieces will find it a natural fit.
tools.info.delete-pages.description: Strip unwanted pages out of a PDF in moments and keep what matters perfectly intact. Just pick the pages to discard, and a fresh PDF is generated without them while the surrounding content holds its integrity. It's a clean way to tidy cluttered files, drop blank pages, cut sections that no longer belong, or shape a document for a particular purpose. Whatever remains keeps its original formatting, images, and text fidelity exactly as it was. You can remove a lone page, a scattered handful, or full ranges in one pass, and nothing happens to your source file until you choose to download the revised version. Since the entire operation takes place within your browser, confidential material stays locked to your machine and never reaches any server. That non-destructive approach makes it ideal for excising sensitive information, cleaning up scans, or trimming stray slides from a presentation, and the polished result is yours to save the instant it's ready.
tools.info.extract-pages.description: Pull exactly the pages you need from a PDF and spin them into a brand-new document containing nothing else. It's the natural choice for building summaries, lifting key sections, assembling custom files from existing PDFs, or sharing only the parts that matter. Single pages, a handful, or whole ranges all extract with pinpoint accuracy, and every bit of formatting, imagery, fonts, and layout transfers so the new file looks identical to its origin. All of this unfolds right inside your browser, which means your documents stay put on your device and never get handed off to an outside server. The extracted PDF carries the same fidelity as the original, with text that remains fully searchable and selectable. Whether you're a student isolating chapters from a textbook, a professional forwarding just the relevant slice of a report, or anyone curating focused document collections for presentations, it gives you precise control over what gets shared and what stays behind.
tools.info.reorder.description: Rearrange the pages of a PDF through a hands-on drag-and-drop canvas that makes reorganizing feel effortless. Slide any page to a new spot to correct a jumbled sequence, restructure how content flows, or shape a document exactly the way you want it to read. Thumbnail previews of every page make the right one easy to spot, and you can move pages one at a time or grab several together. It excels at straightening out badly scanned files, reshuffling report sections, crafting bespoke presentations, or queuing pages for printing in a precise order, and you can preview the new arrangement before committing to it. Throughout, your file's formatting, images, and text fidelity stay untouched. Nothing about this leaves your computer, so privacy is never in question, and the reordered PDF keeps its full quality and saves the moment you're done. It's a favorite among professionals reshaping documents, students arranging course material, and anyone tailoring their PDF structure.
tools.info.rotate.description: Turn individual pages or an entire PDF to the orientation you actually need, with control measured in precise increments. Spin pages 90, 180, or 270 degrees to repair crooked scans, change the angle a document is viewed at, or ready pages for particular printing or display requirements. Because you can target specific pages on their own, only the ones that are off get corrected while everything else stays exactly as it was. That precision is a lifesaver for scans captured at the wrong angle, pages accidentally flipped during digitizing, or documents headed for an unconventional viewing orientation. Content fidelity survives the rotation completely, with text, images, and formatting all preserved, and rotated text remains searchable and selectable so the document keeps working as intended. The whole thing happens instantly within your browser, never sending your files off your device, and the corrected PDF retains its quality and is ready to download right away once the angles are set straight.
tools.info.insert-blank.description: Drop empty pages into a PDF wherever your document needs a little breathing room. Add space for notes, introduce clean page breaks, satisfy specific printing requirements, or hold a spot open for content you'll add later. You decide precisely where the blanks land, whether at the very front, the very end, or tucked between any two existing pages, and you control how many go in. It's a handy move for opening room to jot handwritten notes, setting up breaks before printing, prepping a document for binding, or reserving placeholders for future material. Each inserted page automatically takes on the size and orientation of the pages already in your file, so the result stays consistent. Every part of this runs locally within your browser, keeping your work private and off any server, and the updated PDF holds its full quality and is ready to download as soon as it's built. Students carving out note-taking space, professionals prepping print jobs, and anyone padding out a PDF will reach for it often.
tools.info.duplicate-pages.description: Copy any page within a PDF as many times as you like, skipping the tedious manual copy-and-paste entirely. Replicate one page or several at once and drop the duplicates wherever they belong in the document. It's a real time-saver for spinning up multiple copies of a form that needs filling out repeatedly, reusing a template page over and over, or keeping backup copies of an important page inside the same file. Each duplicate is an exact replica, carrying every visual element and piece of functionality from the page it was cloned from, so formatting, images, and text fidelity all come along perfectly. The processing happens in the blink of an eye and stays entirely within your browser, which means your documents never leave the device you're working on. When you're finished, the resulting PDF preserves its full quality and downloads immediately, making it perfect for churning out form copies, reusing templates, or building in backup pages for documents you can't afford to lose.
tools.info.reverse-order.description: Flip the page sequence of any PDF in a single click, turning your last page into the first and cascading the whole order backwards. This comes in handy when a scanner has captured pages back to front, when a particular binding method calls for a reversed layout, or when you simply want a mirror-ordered copy of an existing document. Nothing about the pages themselves changes: every word, image, and formatting detail carries over intact, just rearranged from end to beginning. Because the reordering runs entirely on your own machine within the browser, your file is never uploaded anywhere and stays under your control the whole time. The finished PDF comes out at full fidelity and is ready to save the instant the flip completes. It's a quick fix for anyone wrestling with reverse-scanned paperwork, setting up documents for an alternative binding style, or building a second version of a file in the opposite sequence.
tools.info.split-by-size.description: Break a bulky PDF into several smaller files, each capped at a maximum size you define in KB, MB, or GB. The tool studies the document and chooses sensible break points so every piece lands within the ceiling you set, which makes it a natural fit for email clients that reject large attachments, cloud platforms with upload caps, or any workflow demanding files of a certain weight. You stay in charge of those thresholds, dialing them up or down to suit the destination. Each chunk that comes out retains the original's formatting, imagery, and crisp text without any degradation. All of this work takes place right inside your browser, so the source document never travels off your device on its way to being divided. Grab the resulting pieces one at a time or bundle them into a single ZIP. Ideal for professionals emailing hefty reports, students facing assignment upload limits, or anyone bound by strict size requirements.
tools.info.split-by-bookmarks.descriptio: Carve a PDF apart along the lines of its own bookmark or chapter structure, turning each bookmarked section into its own standalone file. The tool reads every bookmark in the document and lets you decide which level to split on, whether that's top-level chapters, deeper subsections, or whatever tier matches your organizing logic. That makes it especially handy for taming sprawling technical manuals, academic textbooks, legal filings, or any PDF built on a clear hierarchy. Quality holds steady throughout: each piece keeps its formatting, images, and sharp text, and the relevant bookmarks travel along inside it. Privacy is built in because the entire operation runs locally in your browser, with no upload step involved at any point. Once split, the files can be saved individually or collected together in a ZIP archive. It's a great fit for students sorting course readings into chapters, professionals wrangling large document libraries, or anyone needing to reduce a structured PDF into bite-sized parts.
tools.info.sign.description: Add your signature to a PDF in moments by drawing it freehand with a mouse or touchpad, typing your name in a selection of fonts, or uploading a scanned image of your real signature. A flexible placement system then lets you drop that mark anywhere on any page, resizing and nudging it until the fit looks right, which suits contracts, forms, legal paperwork, or anything awaiting your approval. The signature becomes a genuine part of the file, embedded into the document itself rather than layered loosely on top. Every step, including the handling of your signature data, takes place locally in the browser, so none of that information ever leaves the device you're working on. Your signed PDF emerges looking sharp and is available to download the moment you finish. This is tailor-made for remote workers approving documents from afar, students turning in signed coursework, or anyone who wants to put pen to paper digitally and skip the printer entirely.
tools.info.redact.description: Strip sensitive material out of a PDF for good by blacking it out, with no way to recover what's been covered once the job is done. You pick the exact regions or text to obscure, keeping tight control over precisely which details disappear, and you can target written passages, images, or whole stretches of a page. That permanence matters most for legal filings, medical records, financial statements, or any file carrying personal information you can't risk leaking, since the hidden content can't be lifted back out afterward. The whole redaction happens on your own computer inside the browser, which means confidential documents never need to be uploaded to a server to be cleaned. Whatever remains visible stays crisp and high-quality, and the redacted file is ready to download as soon as processing wraps. A reliable choice for attorneys shielding client details, healthcare staff guarding patient data, or anyone who needs to circulate a document while keeping its private parts truly private.
tools.info.remove-hidden-data.descriptio: Scrub a PDF clean of everything lurking beneath the surface: metadata, scripts, and embedded extras that you may not even realize are riding along. The tool clears out author names, creation and modification dates, the software that produced the file, comments, annotations, leftover form-field entries, JavaScript, attached files, and other concealed content, leaving a document that's genuinely safe to pass around. That kind of thorough cleanup matters when you're publishing files openly, handing them to outside parties, or simply treating privacy as a priority. Everything you can actually see, including text, images, and layout, survives untouched while the invisible baggage is stripped away. Since the cleaning runs locally in your browser, the file never has to leave your device to get sanitized. The polished result keeps its full visual quality and is downloadable right after the process finishes. A smart safeguard for professionals posting documents publicly, students submitting work, or anyone determined to share PDFs with zero hidden traces.
tools.info.certificate.description: Sign a PDF with a digital X.509 certificate to gain a stronger guarantee of identity and authenticity than a drawn or typed signature can offer, which is exactly what legal documents, official forms, and binding contracts often demand. The tool accepts standard .pfx and .p12 certificate files and lets you record details like the reason for signing and your location. Because certificates supply cryptographic proof of who you are and confirm the document hasn't been altered, the resulting signature carries legal weight in many jurisdictions and acts as a tamper-evident seal that reveals any post-signing changes. Crucially, your certificate and private keys are processed entirely within the browser on your own machine and never get transmitted anywhere. The signed PDF retains its full quality and is available to save immediately once signing completes. Built for lawyers executing contracts, government employees certifying official records, or anyone whose PDFs require verified, cryptographically backed signatures.
tools.info.pdf-to-images.description: Turn every page of a PDF into a polished image file, choosing PNG, JPEG, or WebP depending on what you're after. PNG holds onto pixel-perfect quality and supports transparency, JPEG trims file sizes while staying good-looking, and WebP brings modern compression with a standout quality-to-size balance. You can convert the whole document at once or cherry-pick individual pages, and each page comes out as its own separate image at the original resolution, with all the text, graphics, and layout faithfully reproduced. This is great for pulling pages out as pictures, generating thumbnails, prepping visuals for a slide deck, or feeding PDF content into image-editing software. Your file stays put on your device throughout, since the conversion is handled right inside the browser with no upload required. When it's finished, download the images one by one or grab them all in a single ZIP. Perfect for designers harvesting artwork from PDFs, students assembling presentation materials, or anyone converting PDF pages into usable image formats.
tools.info.images-to-pdf.description: Turn a folder of pictures into one tidy PDF by stitching together PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, and BMP files in whatever sequence you choose. Upload as many images as you like, then drag and drop to reorder them so the finished document flows exactly the way you intend. Each picture lands on its own page, carrying over its native resolution, true colors, and fine detail with nothing lost in translation. Because every step runs right inside your browser, the photos you add are never transmitted anywhere or stored on an outside server. Once the pages are assembled, the crisp, full-quality PDF is ready to save to your device in a single click. Whether you're assembling a photo album, bundling a stack of scanned pages into one file, packaging an image collection for sharing, or building a quick slideshow-style presentation from graphics, this is a flexible way to merge visuals into a single, well-ordered document that looks polished from the first page to the last.
tools.info.pdf-to-word.description: Reclaim editable text from a locked-down PDF by converting it into a clean DOCX you can open in Microsoft Word or any compatible word processor. The engine reads each page intelligently, recognizing paragraphs, tables, images, and styling, then rebuilds them: tables come through as genuine Word tables, pictures are embedded in place, and the original formatting is carried over as faithfully as possible so the document's structure stays intact. That makes it straightforward to revise wording, pull passages out for reuse, or reshape a static file into something fully modifiable. Your files stay entirely on your own machine throughout, since the conversion runs in the browser with nothing sent off to be processed elsewhere. When it finishes, a well-formatted Word file is yours to download on the spot. It's a natural fit for professionals reworking PDF copy, students who need their course material in an editable form, and anyone wanting to lift usable text out of a fixed document.
tools.info.pdf-to-excel.description: Pull structured tables and figures straight out of a PDF and rebuild them as a working XLSX spreadsheet. The tool reads table layouts intelligently, dropping each value into its own cell across proper rows and columns so the numbers arrive ready to sort, edit, total, or analyze rather than trapped in a static page. This shines when you're dealing with financial statements, invoices, line-item reports, or any other tabular content locked inside a document. Throughout the process the original data structure and formatting are kept faithfully, so what you see in the sheet mirrors what was in the PDF. Everything is computed within your own browser session, which means the source file never travels to a remote server and stays under your control. The moment conversion wraps, a neatly organized spreadsheet is available to download. Accountants pulling figures from statements, analysts wrangling tabular reports, and anyone who needs PDF tables turned into editable cells will find it indispensable.
tools.info.pdf-to-text.description: Strip every word out of a PDF and hand it back as a clean, plain text file with no formatting codes, stray symbols, or layout clutter in the way. Content is gathered from all pages in the correct reading order, so the flow of the document is preserved even once the styling is gone, leaving you with something tidy and easy to scan. This is handy when you want to copy passages, run text analysis, prepare material for downstream processing, or feed PDF content into another application. Privacy is built in by design: the extraction is performed locally within your browser, so the document never leaves your computer or touches an external server. As soon as the text is gathered, the resulting file can be saved to your device immediately. Researchers mining documents for analysis, writers lifting copy out for editing, and anyone who simply needs the raw words from a PDF without the surrounding formatting will get exactly what they're after.
tools.info.pdf-to-csv.description: Lift tabular data out of a PDF and recast it as a clean CSV file, with each value comma-separated and laid out in proper rows and columns. The tool reads table structures intelligently so the output drops straight into Excel, Google Sheets, a database, or any analysis tool without manual cleanup. That makes it ideal when you're prepping figures for data analysis, importing structured records, or pulling reference tables out of reports for further work. The original organization of the data is carried through the conversion, keeping the extracted information accurate and ready to use. None of this involves uploading anything: the whole job runs inside your browser, so your document stays on your own device and never reaches a server. As soon as the file is built, the CSV downloads instantly. Data analysts harvesting tables, researchers converting report data for crunching, and anyone who needs PDF tables reformatted into portable CSV will find the workflow quick and dependable.
tools.info.pdf-to-html.description: Transform a PDF into web-ready HTML that opens in any browser while holding onto the original visual layout, images, and text formatting. Each page is rebuilt as an HTML page that closely mirrors the source, and the result can be opened straight away or refined further in an HTML editor. This is especially handy for publishing document content on the web, repurposing PDFs for online use, or generating browser-friendly versions of files that previously only existed as static documents. The structure and visual elements are preserved through the conversion, so the markup reflects how the original looked rather than flattening it into bare text. Your files are handled entirely within the browser and stay on your device, with nothing uploaded to an outside server at any point. Once it's done, the HTML file is ready to save immediately. Web developers turning PDFs into pages, content creators moving material online, and anyone needing a web-compatible version of a document will find it a practical bridge.
tools.info.pdf-to-markdown.description: Convert PDF content into clean Markdown that's easy to edit and friendly to version control. Text is extracted and rendered into Markdown syntax with headings, lists, and basic formatting carried over, preserving the document's hierarchy and structure so the result reads like something authored by hand rather than machine-dumped. The output opens in any text editor and slots neatly into Git or other version-control systems, which is why it works so well for documentation, blog drafts, technical writing, and any content that belongs in a plain-text markup format. The entire conversion takes place inside your browser, keeping the source document on your own machine and away from any server. When it's finished, the Markdown file can be downloaded right away, ready to commit or continue editing. Technical writers turning reference PDFs into docs, bloggers repurposing material into posts, and anyone who needs a tidy Markdown version of a PDF will appreciate how editable and portable the result is.
tools.info.compress.description: Shrink a bulky PDF down to a far smaller file without sacrificing the quality that matters. The optimizer works on images, fonts, and embedded content, applying smart compression that trims size while keeping pages visually clear: text stays sharp and searchable, and graphics are reduced to the smallest sensible footprint. That lets you slim down scanned documents, image-heavy decks, or long reports so they fit under email attachment caps, upload faster to web portals, and take up less room in storage. Confidentiality is never a trade-off here, because every byte is processed locally in your browser and not a single file is sent to any server, so even sensitive material stays private and on your device. When optimization completes, the polished, high-quality PDF is ready to download immediately. It's a reliable choice for professionals battling attachment limits, students meeting strict submission sizes, and anyone who simply wants a lighter, easier-to-share PDF.
tools.info.add-watermark.description: Stamp text or an image watermark across the pages of any PDF, whether you want a faint background mark or a bold, eye-catching overlay. It's the right fit for labeling files as Confidential or Draft, branding documents with a company logo, or sealing your work with a copyright notice before it leaves your hands. You decide everything about how the mark sits on the page: placement, opacity, rotation, size, and color are all yours to adjust. Apply it to every page or hand-pick the ones that need it, keeping your branding steady from cover to back. Because the entire operation runs on your own machine inside the browser, nothing ever travels to a remote server, and confidential material stays strictly under your control. Once it's done, a crisp, full-resolution PDF is ready to save on the spot. A natural choice for companies reinforcing their brand, freelancers safeguarding their output, or anyone who wants documents marked before they circulate.
tools.info.page-numbers.description: Drop page numbers into a PDF with the exact position and formatting you want. Lengthy reports, academic papers, theses, legal filings, and print-bound manuals all benefit from clear pagination, and this handles each of them. Pick precisely where the numbers land, top or bottom and left, center, or right, then tune the font, size, and starting figure to suit the job. Number the whole file or leave certain pages untouched, such as a cover sheet you'd rather skip. Your sensitive documents stay private the whole way through, since every calculation is performed right inside the browser on your device with nothing sent off to be processed elsewhere. The finished file comes out sharp and true to the original, downloadable the instant numbering wraps up. Well suited to professionals putting the final touches on formal reports, students shaping dissertations to spec, or anyone bringing order to a multi-page PDF headed for print.
tools.info.crop.description: Trim away unwanted margins and borders from PDF pages with real precision. Excess white space around scans, stray black scanner edges, and clutter that pulls attention from the core content all come off cleanly for tidier printing and viewing. A visual interface lets you set the crop boundaries by eye, applying one consistent crop across the document or fine-tuning page by page when they differ. Tidying up scanned books, slimming files for smaller screens, or prepping pages for presentations and reports are all squarely in its wheelhouse, and everything inside the area you keep, text, images, and formatting alike, survives the cut intact. None of this leaves your computer: the cropping is carried out locally in the browser, so private documents are never uploaded anywhere. What you download afterward is a clean PDF that holds onto its original fidelity. Great for students cleaning up scanned coursework, designers tightening page layouts, or anyone clearing away surplus PDF margins.
tools.info.resize.description: Switch a PDF's page size to a standard format like A4 or Letter, or to dimensions you define yourself. It shines when you need to standardize a mix of differently sized pages before printing, move between paper formats for international colleagues, or meet a strict layout spec. Choose from familiar presets or punch in your own width and height; either way, content scales to the new size while aspect ratio and readability hold steady. Prepping files for a print shop, unifying scans that came in at odd sizes, or matching regional paper standards all become straightforward. Privacy is built in by design, because the resizing runs entirely within your browser and your files never touch an external server, keeping even sensitive material yours alone. The output preserves the look and clarity of the source and is available to download as soon as the work finishes. A solid pick for professionals readying documents for print, students bringing assignments to a uniform size, or anyone wanting consistent PDF dimensions.
tools.info.grayscale.description: Turn a color PDF into clean black and white, converting every page to smooth grayscale tones. The payoff comes in smaller file sizes, cheaper monochrome printing that spares your color ink, and a more uniform, polished feel for reports and handouts. Each page is processed automatically, with colored text, images, and graphics rendered as graduated shades of gray that hold their sharpness and detail. Printing long documents economically, archiving in a consistent format, or stripping distracting color before you share are all natural fits. Your files stay confidential throughout, as the conversion happens on your own device in the browser and nothing is ever uploaded to an outside server. The result keeps its visual quality intact and is ready to download the moment it's done. Ideal for professionals readying files for monochrome printing, students trimming ink costs, or anyone after a tidy black-and-white PDF.
tools.info.invert-colors.description: Flip the colors of a PDF so bright white backgrounds turn dark and black text turns light, giving you a comfortable dark-mode reading experience. It's a relief for late-night study sessions, hours of on-screen reading, and viewing in dim surroundings where a glaring page would tire your eyes. Every color across all pages is inverted at once while the text stays crisp, legible, and fully selectable, so the document keeps working exactly as before. One operation transforms the whole file, instantly delivering a dark-themed version made for screens. Privacy never enters the equation, because the inversion is computed locally within your browser and no file is uploaded to any server, so your documents stay yours. The PDF you get back retains its original quality and is downloadable straight away. Built for students reading after dark, professionals reviewing on a monitor, and anyone who simply prefers dark mode for easier reading.
tools.info.flatten.description: Fuse form fields, annotations, and interactive elements straight into the static page content so they're locked permanently in place. This is what you reach for when finalizing completed forms before sharing, stopping recipients from editing the data you entered, or guaranteeing the document looks identical in every viewer and on every printer. After flattening, fillable fields, checkboxes, comments, and markups become part of the page itself, and what's visible is preserved precisely as intended with no editable layers left behind. Submitting official forms, archiving signed paperwork, or distributing files that must stay unchanged are exactly the moments it earns its keep. Confidentiality is never in question here, since the whole process executes inside your browser on your own machine and your files are never sent anywhere. The flattened PDF keeps its full quality and is ready to save immediately. A dependable tool for professionals locking down forms, businesses sending out fixed documents, and anyone needing a tamper-resistant, print-ready file.
tools.info.remove-annotations.descriptio: Strip every comment, highlight, sticky note, and markup out of a PDF, leaving a clean, distraction-free document behind. It's made for clearing reviewer feedback ahead of publishing, wiping collaborative notes from a finished draft, or producing a polished copy of a file that got marked up heavily during editing. In a single pass it locates and removes all annotation layers across every page, while the underlying text, images, and formatting stay exactly as they were. That makes finalizing reports, cleaning up shared documents, or turning out a professional copy free of editorial clutter quick and reliable. Your material stays private from start to finish, because the cleanup runs locally in your browser and no document is ever transmitted to a server. When it's finished, you download a PDF that has lost none of its original quality. A natural fit for editors wrapping up manuscripts, teams tidying reviewed files, and anyone who needs a spotless, annotation-free document.
tools.info.extract-images.description: Need the original photos and graphics out of a PDF? This tool pulls every embedded image from your document and saves each one as a separate file, so you never have to screenshot pages one by one. It scans the document page by page, detects all embedded images, and extracts them at their native resolution, so each picture keeps the exact quality it had inside the PDF. Because everything runs right inside your browser, the file never leaves your device and no server ever sees it, keeping confidential reports and catalogs fully private. Once the scan finishes, you can grab the images one at a time or pull the whole set down as a single ZIP archive, ready to drop straight into other projects. It is a fast way to recover photos from a report, repurpose illustrations for a deck, or collect product shots from a catalog, and it suits designers reusing graphics, marketers gathering product photos, and anyone who needs clean image files lifted out of a PDF.
tools.info.remove-images.description: Strip every picture out of a PDF in one pass while leaving the words exactly where they were, and you get a slim, text-only document that is still fully searchable. The tool finds and deletes all embedded images across all pages at once, preserving text, layout, and formatting untouched, which makes it ideal for crushing the size of an image-heavy report before you email it, building a clean copy for distraction-free reading, or cutting photos from files where only the writing matters. None of this touches a remote server: the whole job is handled locally within your browser, so even sensitive documents stay on your machine and remain private from start to finish. When the images are gone, the finished PDF retains its full text quality and is ready to save the moment processing wraps up. It is a handy fit for students printing text-only notes, professionals trimming bulky attachments, and anyone who wants the written content without the visual weight.
tools.info.optimize-images.description: Shrink a PDF that is too heavy to send by downscaling and compressing the images packed inside it, all while keeping the document looking crisp and professional. The tool intelligently reduces oversized images and applies efficient compression to each one, striking a balance between a much smaller file and strong visual quality on every page. That makes it a natural choice for squeezing image-heavy reports under email limits, clearing the upload caps on web portals, or speeding up how quickly bulky presentations and catalogs share and store. Your privacy is built in by design, since the compression runs entirely on your own device inside the browser and nothing is ever sent to a server, so confidential files stay confidential. The optimized PDF comes out sharp and is available to download as soon as the work completes. Think distributing large documents, archiving efficiently, or prepping PDFs for fast online delivery, and it serves professionals emailing big reports, businesses tuning documents for the web, and anyone who needs a smaller, faster file.
tools.info.add-qr-code.description: Drop a scannable QR code straight onto your PDF pages, encoding any web link or plain text you like so readers can jump from paper or screen to the destination you choose. Add a website URL to a flyer, tuck contact details into a brochure, or stamp a payment or download link onto an invoice or event ticket; whatever the content, you position and size the code precisely on the exact page where people will scan it. Each code renders crisply at print quality, so scanners read it reliably whether it appears on a monitor or a printed sheet. Everything is generated on the spot in your own browser, which means your document is never uploaded anywhere and stays entirely private to you. The moment the code is placed, your PDF keeps its original sharpness and is ready to download right away. Marketers building print campaigns, event organizers producing tickets and passes, and small business owners linking documents to online resources will all find it useful.
tools.info.add-barcode.description: Generate machine-readable barcodes in Code128, EAN, or UPC formats and place them directly into your PDF, all from a single file. Pick the symbology, type in your data, and drag the barcode to sit precisely where it belongs in your layout, whether that is a UPC on a product catalog, a tracking number on a shipping or inventory sheet, or a price tag and asset label headed for the floor. Every barcode is drawn at sharp, print-ready resolution so it scans dependably at the register or out in the warehouse. There is no upload step anywhere in the process; the codes are created and embedded right inside your browser, which keeps your data on your own machine and away from any server. As soon as it is done, the PDF holds its full clarity and saves to your device on demand. It is built for retailers prepping product labels, warehouse and logistics teams tracking stock, and small businesses producing scannable documents in-house.
tools.info.add-bookmarks.description: Give a long PDF the navigation it deserves by building or editing its bookmarks and assembling a clickable table of contents inside the file. You can add fresh bookmark entries, rename or reorder the ones already there, and aim each bookmark at the precise page it should open, which leaves your document with a tidy outline that shows up in the sidebar of any standard PDF reader for instant jumping. It is perfect for wiring chapter links into a lengthy report, helping readers glide through ebooks and manuals, or imposing structure on a scanned multi-section document. All of the editing takes place locally in your browser, so the file is never handed off to a server and your content stays private throughout. The bookmarked PDF preserves its original quality intact and is ready for download as soon as you finish arranging the outline. Authors publishing ebooks, professionals preparing lengthy reports, and educators organizing course material for easy navigation will get the most out of it.
tools.info.add-hyperlinks.description: Turn a static PDF into something readers can click through by adding or editing live links that send them straight to web pages or other destinations. Place a link over specific text or a region of the page, set its target URL, and adjust or delete any existing link to keep every reference current and working; the links stay fully interactive in any standard PDF viewer. This is just right for connecting a report's citations to their sources, making the email addresses and URLs in a brochure clickable, or steering readers toward related material online. Your file is handled entirely within the browser on your own device, so nothing is transmitted to a server and even sensitive documents remain confidential. Once your links are in place, the PDF keeps its full quality and downloads immediately, no waiting required. It is a strong fit for marketers building interactive brochures, researchers citing online sources, and professionals assembling reference-rich documents that need to point somewhere.
tools.info.add-attachments.description: Bundle supporting files right inside a PDF so that images, documents, and data all travel together as one self-contained package. You can embed multiple files of different types into a single PDF, where recipients reach them through the attachments panel of any standard PDF reader without the visible pages changing at all, which keeps related materials organized and stops anything from getting separated in transit. It shines when you need to pair a spreadsheet with a financial report, attach supporting evidence to a legal filing, or ship raw data files alongside a research paper. Privacy is never a concern here because the embedding happens locally in your browser and your files are never uploaded to any server, so confidential material stays with you. After the attachments are tucked in, the PDF retains its full quality and is ready to download the instant processing finishes. Legal professionals assembling case files, researchers sharing datasets, and analysts delivering reports with their source data will find it especially handy.

tools.sanitize.title: Clean PDF
tools.sanitize.desc: Remove all hidden data, metadata, and sensitive information from the PDF for safe sharing.
tools.sanitize.note: All hidden data will be removed. The PDF content (text, images, pages) will remain unchanged.
tools.certificate.drop: Click or drop certificate file here
tools.certificate.note: Note: A visual signature will be added to the PDF with the certificate details. Full digital signature support may require server-side processing.

tools.sign.signaturePad.title: Create signature

tools.meta.descSuffix: Free online PDF tool — no installation, no account required. Files are processed locally in your browser. 100% private.
tools.indexMeta.title: Free Online PDF Tools — No Signup Required
tools.indexMeta.description: All free PDF tools in one place: merge, split, compress, convert, edit, sign, and more. No installation, no account. Files are processed locally in your browser.
faq.contactPrompt: Can't find what you're looking for?
faq.stillDesc: We're here to help! Get in touch with our team or check out our documentation.
faq.metaDesc: Find answers to common questions about EditoraPDF — a free, open-source PDF editor. Learn about features, privacy, security, and how to use our online PDF editing tool.
schema.featuresDesc: Key features of EditoraPDF PDF Editor
schema.f1Desc: Render pages with crystal clarity, zoom seamlessly, and navigate with smart thumbnails
schema.f2Desc: Reorder, rotate, delete pages. Add text, images, shapes, and highlights
schema.f3Desc: Download your edited PDF with all changes applied. No quality loss guaranteed
schema.f4Desc: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your documents never leave your device
schema.f5Desc: Enterprise-level security by design. No server uploads, no subscriptions
schema.app.desc: Edit PDF documents online instantly without installing software or creating an account. Quick, powerful PDF editing directly in your browser with complete privacy.
schema.app.browserReq: Requires a modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari). JavaScript enabled.
schema.app.releaseNotes: Free online PDF editor with instant access. No installation, no signup, no downloads required. Edit PDFs directly in your browser.
schema.app.feat1: Instant access - no installation or signup required
schema.app.feat2: Works entirely in your browser - no downloads
schema.app.feat3: Edit PDF text and content directly
schema.app.feat8: Fill forms and add text overlays
schema.app.feat9: Export and download updated PDF instantly
schema.app.feat10: 100% private - all processing on your device
blog.disclaimerBody: EditoraPDF provides online PDF editing tools for general use only. We make no guarantees regarding accuracy, completeness, or suitability for any specific purpose. Users are responsible for reviewing all documents before use. By using this website, you agree to our
